notes: Short bridge file (176 lines, 8 theorems) connecting the formal-group series side (formalIsogenySeries_frobenius = X^q) to the invariant-differential side (omegaPullbackCoeff_frobenius = 0) for the Frobenius isogeny over a finite field. All proofs are axiom-clean and short (≤9 lines); no sorry, no set_option. The central result `omegaPullbackCoeff_frobenius` is heavily consumed by GapSpines.lean, GapQfKernel.lean, and AdditionPullback/Differential.lean; four of the eight declarations are leaves unused within the file itself.
